title: 处理客户投诉和质量问题
theme: 从 complaint / defect / solution 开始
goals: 能先安抚客户情绪，再收集问题证据
能区分 scratch、defect、missing piece 等常见质量问题
能给出内部检查、替换、补发或下一单抵扣等补救方向

review.title: Day 09 复习
items: 昨天练了 revise、change request、adjustment、affect 和 extra cost。
今天进入更高难度的售后场景：客户投诉质量问题、数量少件或包装破损。
处理投诉时，先表达理解和重视，再要照片、视频、数量等证据，最后给解决方案。

preview.scenario: 客户收到样品或大货后反馈有划痕、破损、少件、颜色不对或质量不稳定，需要你稳住客户并推进内部调查。
needToKnow: 客户投诉时，不要马上争辩，也不要马上承诺赔偿。
先收集 evidence，例如 photos、videos、quantity、carton number。
solution 要具体：replacement、repair、discount、credit for next order 或重新检查库存。

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户反馈质量、数量或服务问题。
vocabulary.example: We take your complaint seriously and will check it right away.

vocabulary.usage: 比 problem 更商务，适合描述客户反馈的问题。
vocabulary.example: Could you please send us photos of the issue?

vocabulary.usage: 用于产品本身有质量缺陷的情况。
vocabulary.example: Please mark the defective items clearly in the photos.

vocabulary.usage: 用于表面有刮痕、擦伤或外观损伤。
vocabulary.example: There are some scratches on the surface.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户收到的数量比订单少。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm how many missing pieces there are.

vocabulary.usage: 用于要求客户提供照片、视频、箱号等证明材料。
vocabulary.example: Please send us clear evidence so we can investigate the issue.

vocabulary.usage: 用于质量问题后的补发或替换安排。
vocabulary.example: We can arrange replacement for the defective items.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户投诉后提出处理办法。
vocabulary.example: We will check internally and offer a solution as soon as possible.

sentences.label: 重视投诉
sentences.natural: We will check this issue right away.
sentences.business: We take your complaint seriously and will check this issue with our team right away.

sentences.label: 请求照片视频
sentences.natural: Could you please send us photos of the issue?
sentences.business: Could you please send us clear photos or videos of the issue so we can investigate it properly?

sentences.label: 确认缺陷数量
sentences.natural: How many defective items did you receive?
sentences.business: Could you please confirm the quantity of defective items and mark them clearly in the photos?

sentences.label: 提出补发方向
sentences.natural: We can arrange replacement for the defective items.
sentences.business: After we verify the issue, we can arrange replacement for the defective items or discuss another suitable solution.

sentences.label: 内部调查
sentences.natural: We will check this with our production team.
sentences.business: We will investigate this issue with our production and quality control teams, then update you with a solution.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太直接，客户已经不满时，这样说容易显得你不重视。
chatAnalysis.better: Could you please send us photos of the issue?
chatAnalysis.upgrade: We are sorry to hear that. Could you please send us clear photos or videos of the issue so we can investigate it properly?

chatAnalysis.problem: 表达不完整，没有说明你会查什么、什么时候给方案。
chatAnalysis.better: We will check this issue with our factory.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: We will investigate this issue with our production and quality control teams, then update you with a solution as soon as possible.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太快承诺，应该先核实问题数量和原因，再给补救方案。
chatAnalysis.better: We can arrange replacement after we verify the issue.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: After we verify the issue and defective quantity, we can arrange replacement or discuss another suitable solution.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：客户反馈划痕

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Some products have scratches on the surface.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We are sorry to hear that. Could you please send us clear photos of the scratches?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I will send photos now.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. We will check this issue with our quality control team right away.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：客户反馈少件

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We received fewer pieces than expected.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I am sorry for the inconvenience. Could you please confirm how many missing pieces there are?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: There are 30 missing pieces.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Please also send us the carton number so we can investigate it with our warehouse.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户要求马上赔偿

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: This is unacceptable. We need compensation now.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand your concern, and we take this complaint seriously.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What solution can you offer?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: After we verify the issue and defective quantity, we will offer a fair solution as soon as possible.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：客户投诉质量问题并要求解决方案

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, we received the goods, but there is a quality issue.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I am sorry to hear that. Could you please tell me what happened?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Some items have scratches on the surface.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We take this complaint seriously. Could you please send us clear photos or videos of the issue?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Yes, I will send the photos now.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Please also mark the defective items clearly in the photos.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: There are around 50 defective items.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Could you please confirm the exact quantity of defective items?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I will count them again and confirm.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Please also send us the carton numbers if possible.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Why did this happen? Did you inspect the goods before shipment?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we arranged inspection before shipment, but we will investigate this issue with our quality control team again.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: This affects our customer delivery.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand your concern. We will handle this as a priority.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send replacements immediately?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: After we verify the issue and defective quantity, we can arrange replacement or discuss another suitable solution.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need a clear solution today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. I will share the evidence with our production and quality control teams right away.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please do not delay this.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. I will update you as soon as we finish the internal check.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you offer a discount if we keep the defective items?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: That may be possible. Let us verify the issue first, then we can discuss replacement, discount, or credit for the next order.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, I will send all photos and carton numbers.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Once we receive the evidence, we will investigate it immediately and offer a solution.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please keep me updated.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Of course. I will keep you updated until this issue is solved.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我们非常重视你的投诉。
exercises.hint: take something seriously 表示认真对待。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：send photo
exercises.answer: Could you please send us clear photos of the issue?
acceptable: could you please send us clear photos of the issue
please send us clear photos of the issue
exercises.hint: 客户投诉时语气要更礼貌。

exercises.prompt: 填空：Please confirm the quantity of ____ items.
exercises.hint: defective items 表示有缺陷的产品。

exercises.prompt: 客户要求马上赔偿，哪个回复更适合？
options: After we verify the issue and defective quantity, we will offer a fair solution as soon as possible.
exercises.answer: After we verify the issue and defective quantity, we will offer a fair solution as soon as possible.
acceptable: after we verify the issue and defective quantity we will offer a fair solution as soon as possible
exercises.hint: 不要马上承诺赔偿，先核实问题和数量。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我们会安排有缺陷产品的补发。
exercises.answer: We will arrange replacement for the defective items.
acceptable: we will arrange replacement for the defective items
we can arrange replacement for the defective items
exercises.hint: replacement 表示替换品或补发。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Some items have scratches on the surface. 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: We are sorry to hear that. Could you please send us clear photos of the scratches so we can investigate the issue?
acceptable: we are sorry to hear that could you please send us clear photos of the scratches so we can investigate the issue
could you please send us clear photos of the scratches so we can investigate the issue
exercises.hint: 先表达遗憾，再请求照片证据。

homework: 把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍。
跟读长对话 2 遍，重点练客户投诉时的安抚、取证和补救方案。
tomorrow: Day 11 会练解释价格差异和涨价原因。
